game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions! Baba Is You is an award-winning puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different.



The game has over 200 levels that experiment with the game's mechanics in a multitude of ways, requiring the player to understand and manipulate the rules of the game and figure out devious ways to make the objects in the game world interact.



The game was originally created for and won the Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You also won the Excellence in Design and Best Student Game awards in the Independent Games Festival 2018, and was nominated a finalist in 2 other categories, including the Seumas McNally Grand Prize. The game was made using Multimedia Fusion 2 by Clickteam.
game_info.description: Master the art of rule manipulation in this block-pushing puzzle game! Push word blocks to form rules that define the game world. Create statements like "BABA IS YOU" to control your character, "WALL IS STOP" to define obstacles, and "FLAG IS WIN" to set your goal. Break and remake rules to solve increasingly complex puzzles across multiple levels. Transform objects, change win conditions, and discover creative solutions by manipulating the very fabric of reality!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the player character (or whatever IS YOU)
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen
ENTER: Start the game from start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and collision detection with walls and blocks. Validates that the player can move in all four directions and properly interacts with solid objects.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character in all four cardinal directions, attempting to push blocks and interact with walls. Test boundary collision and block-pushing mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, stops at walls marked as STOP, and can push movable word blocks. No clipping through solid objects occurs.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by solving a complete level. This validates rule formation, goal achievement, and game progression mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze the level layout, identify the win condition (typically FLAG IS WIN), navigate to the winning object while respecting active rules, and trigger the win state.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when the player character touches the win object. Final score reflects level completion.
TEST_2.description: Tests the win condition by solving a complete level. This validates rule formation, goal achievement, and game progression mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy: Analyze the level layout, identify the win condition (typically FLAG IS WIN), navigate to the winning object while respecting active rules, and trigger the win state.
TEST_2.expected: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state when the player character touches the win object. Final score reflects level completion.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests rule manipulation by pushing word blocks to create and break game rules. Validates the rule parsing system and dynamic property changes.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Push word blocks to form valid rules (NOUN IS PROPERTY), then break those rules by separating the blocks. Observe how game properties change in real-time.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Rules are correctly parsed when blocks align horizontally or vertically. Object properties update immediately when rules form or break.
TEST_3.description: Tests rule manipulation by pushing word blocks to create and break game rules. Validates the rule parsing system and dynamic property changes.
TEST_3.strategy: Push word blocks to form valid rules (NOUN IS PROPERTY), then break those rules by separating the blocks. Observe how game properties change in real-time.
TEST_3.expected: Rules are correctly parsed when blocks align horizontally or vertically. Object properties update immediately when rules form or break.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests advanced rule interactions including changing the player character and win conditions. Validates complex rule transformations.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Create rules that change what IS YOU from BABA to another object, then create new win conditions by manipulating FLAG and WIN blocks.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player control transfers to the new object when "X IS YOU" is formed. Win condition updates when "X IS WIN" rules change.
